scores.correctness_notes: All three required elements (HTTP health check, env vars, log target) are correctly implemented with proper YAML structure. Fields like override, level, period, timeout, threshold, on-check-failure, and log target fields all match the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Comment claims 'Supported types: loki, syslog' but omits 'opentelemetry' which is a valid type per the gold standard. Also references 'wait_for()' as a Juju Container method alongside get_check() — wait_for() as a Container method is questionable. Minor inaccuracies rather than outright invented APIs.
